reportRule.requiredQuestion: Did blockers fully cover all survivor rooms?

verdicts.RESCUED: At least one both-prime room was found.
verdicts.FULL_COVERAGE_FOUND: Every survivor room was blocked before rescue.
verdicts.PRESSURE_HELD: No full coverage found in this finite test.
verdicts.BOSS_ROW: High survivor mass plus late rescue.
verdicts.WEAK_ROW: Low survivor mass or early rescue.

next3: Use FILTERED_NO_ESCAPE_DMV as the canonical DMV in future reports.
Retire RAW_START_DMV to archive/control status only.
Run a focused large-prime closure audit on the converted top P29 and top trueK rows.
